reviews.review_msg: Tammy's lectures can be dry, but using tools like Unstuck AI for flashcards and tables really helps. Exams are tough, but engaging with the content pays off. Overall, a challenging course that's worth the effort.
she genuinely cares about her students' success. Her accessibility outside of classroom hours is commendable; Also she is very interactive person.

I found her lectures to be dry mostly because she goes off-topic often, and covers material slowly when she's not. Lab activities also seem somewhat pointless given what's asked on lab exams. Exams are all written and can be very hard, but you can do ok if you make many flashcards to help memorize, & tables to help compare things (ie. life cycles).

Hes fairly good at explaining concepts, but lectures can be slow and repetitive. Tests are tough but not because of the material: questions are worded in a way thats meant to trick you, so read them carefully. I found the lab to be much easier and lab exams were very straightforward.

Dr. Lowenberger is the best professor that I have EVER had. He is extremely intelligent and helpful. His tests and grading are more than fair. He makes the material very interesting and easy to learn. I would HIGHLY recommend taking his class. Make sure you participate, as he will remember that when it comes to your grade. The lab is difficult.

Carl is a decent professor who encourages discussion and participation. Tests were tough but fair. Although he is good in many ways, he has no sympathy or understanding towards his students and can be outright mean at times  (had a very bad experience with a group project).  Don't take his class if you are scared of being put on the spot!

Carl is the best prof I've had at SFU. He is so entertaining in class and provides clear notes. He is very passionate about parasites and definitely changed my view of the world. Critical thinking is key in his class. Highly recommend this course with him!

Carl is an enthusiastic individual who genuinely loves the field he works in. He is sarcastic, funny at times, and always engages students during lecture. Parasitology turned out to be the most enjoyable class for me last semester. Attendance is mandatory and taking notes is a must to pass his exams. I got a B+ without purchasing any textbooks.

Carl is one of the best profs that I've ever had. He was very clear and interested in the course material. After taking the course, he changed my life. Taught me how to think outside the box and overall gave amazing advice about life itself. Loved the course and loved the prof. Will miss the class and lab section!
